name: 花時計
position: 主街中央·北侧，喫茶店对面
atmosphere: 宁静温柔，花的香气混着泥土味，每朵花都被照顾得很好

sensory.sight: 当季花、藤蔓、木制花架、干净收银台和摆在中央的当天最好看的花
sensory.sound: 剪刀修枝声，水桶轻碰木地板，店门铃声很轻
sensory.smell: 鲜花、湿润泥土、叶片和清水的味道
sensory.touch: 空气偏湿凉，花茎、丝带和包装纸都带着细腻触感

conversation_hooks: 花店和喫茶店隔街相望

exterior.prompt: 2D side-view of a small Japanese flower shop storefront. Ivy and climbing plants covering the wooden facade. Large display window showing seasonal flowers inside. A wooden signboard hand-painted with '花時計' hangs above. A small wooden flower stand outside the door with a single fresh flower on it — free for anyone. Under a traditional shopping arcade roof. Warm morning light, Studio Ghibli background art style.
exterior.negative: supermarket, plastic flowers, neon sign, modern glass building, 3D, photorealistic

interior.prompt: 2D interior of a small Japanese flower shop. Wooden workbench with flower scissors, ribbons, wrapping paper scattered neatly. Display window with seasonal flowers arranged beautifully — tulips in spring, sunflowers in summer. A small counter with a tiny vase holding the day's best flower. Cool back room with flower buckets visible through a door. Soft natural light through the window. Studio Ghibli background art style, serene atmosphere.
interior.negative: supermarket flowers, plastic, neon lights, cluttered, 3D, photorealistic

spots.counter: 收银台——一尘不染，旁边总放着一小瓶当天最好看的花
spots.workbench: 工作台——花剪、丝带、包装纸散落，樱包扎花束的地方
spots.window_display: 橱窗——当季最美的花，路人会停下来看
spots.window_seat: 窗边长椅——樱偶尔坐在这里看着街对面发呆
spots.doorway: 门口——小花架，每天早上樱放一枝新花，免费的
spots.back_room: 冷藏室——凉凉的湿意，花在这里保鲜

conversation_hooks: 柜台总是收拾得很干净
路过的人会不会喜欢这束花
路过的人能不能闻到花香

time_atmosphere.morning: 樱早起给花换水，晨光透过橱窗照在水珠上闪闪发光
time_atmosphere.evening: 夕阳把花染成暖色，花店最美的时候
time_atmosphere.night: 花都安静了，几盏小灯守护着
